ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "geographic_boundaries" TEXT /* Geographic boundaries of the area */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Economic indicators for the area (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the area is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average property price in the area */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "price_category" TEXT /* Category of property (e.g., apartment, house) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_prices_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "houses_sold" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale record */,
  "houses_sold" INTEGER /* Number of houses sold in the area */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., new build, resale) */,
  "average_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price of houses in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_houses_sold_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the crime record */,
  "no_of_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of crimes in the area */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "crime_category" TEXT /* Category of crime (e.g., violent, non-violent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the economic record */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the area */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the area */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the area */,
  "consumer_price_index" REAL /* Consumer price index of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the demographic record */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the area */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution in the area */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution in the area */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution in the area */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population in the area */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the population in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data provided by the source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided (e.g., CSV, API) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, client) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access event occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., area, report, dashboard) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed, predictive) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "template_format" TEXT /* Format of the template (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_crime_rates" (
  "area_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area crime rate */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime type */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate for the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_crime_rates_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_crime_rates_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)
